panels.description: Close up shot on the protagonist's wide-eyed, horrified face as they stare at a demonic, basilisk-eyed gaze. High contrast, heavy shadows, intense expression.

bubbles.text: The eyes... their blaze of horror... I cannot move.

panels.description: Medium shot of the protagonist holding a shovel, hands trembling, a shallow gash appearing on the ghastly face they are attacking. The atmosphere is thick with dread.

bubbles.text: My hand... it failed me. Only a scratch.

panels.description: Wide angle: Distant silhouettes of wagons approaching through the dark, misty landscape. The protagonist is seen small in the corner, clutching their chest in fear.

bubbles.text: The gipsies... the Szgany... they are here.

panels.description: Medium shot: The protagonist presses their ear against a cold, stone wall. Inset panel shows a heavy iron door locking. Dramatic lighting.

bubbles.text: The locks... they are sealing me in.

panels.description: Action shot: A violent gust of wind slams a heavy wooden door shut, dust and stone debris flying everywhere. Protagonist recoils in shock.
Close up: The protagonist stares upwards toward a sliver of moonlight filtering through a high, impossible stone wall. Expression shifts from despair to desperate resolve.

bubbles.text: Caught in the net of death. But I will scale these walls... or die trying.
